text:
Once upon a time in a small town famous for its tulips, a small tulip wondered why they weren't as famous as tulip bulbs.

"Why so humble?" asked the tulip. "Don't you wish you could travel?"

"You're everywhere," replied the tulip. I pass every day. Just last week you stopped me!

"Sometimes I dream about it," sighed the tulip. "Imagine all the places I'd go."

You'd go to tulip festivals. Lots of people love tulips.

"If I could paint them?" she daydreamed.

"Ohh... I think you'd have an eye for tulips."

She chased every single one. They all knew her tulip fan obsession couldn't end well.

But every tulip stopped to say hi.

"Why do you always leave?" they'd call out.

"They just don't like bad press."

One day she got a big tulip portrait. It wasn't just beautiful.

The next day everything went wrong for
